reasoning: Johannes Kaiser is a fringe right-wing politician in Chile who left the Republican Party. Polling consistently shows him far behind the main contenders on the right, such as Evelyn Matthei (UDI) and José Antonio Kast (Republican Party), who dominate the conservative vote. Kaiser usually polls in the low single digits. Given his lack of broad base, party machinery, and the presence of heavily favored established candidates, the chance of him receiving the most votes in the 1st round of the 2025 election is extremely low.
